ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  HEC Infra Projects Limited's board announced the virtual 21st Annual General Meeting for September 18, 2026, outlining e-voting procedures. Additionally, the board approved the appointment of M/s. Kashyap R. Mehta & Partners as Secretarial Auditors for five years and M/s. P. H. Desai & Co. as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27, both pending shareholder approval. This filing details routine corporate governance decisions, presenting no immediate material financial impacts or discernible red flags.
